# Anime FFmpeg Re-Encoder

> Automated anime encoding workflow for Google Colab with HEVC 10-bit support and free GPU acceleration.

This documentation covers how to use the Anime FFmpeg Re-Encoder notebook for high-quality video encoding on Google Colab.

## Overview

Anime FFmpeg Re-Encoder is a free, automated workflow for encoding anime videos using Google Colab's GPU. It supports:
- HEVC (H.265) 10-bit encoding
- NVENC GPU acceleration (free T4 GPUs)
- x265 CPU encoding fallback
- Automatic download via aria2
- Google Drive upload integration
- Multiple quality presets (360p to 1080p)

## Documentation

- [Quick Start Guide](/quick-start.md): Get started in 5 minutes
- [Installation](/installation.md): Setup requirements and dependencies
- [Usage Guide](/usage.md): Detailed usage instructions
- [Encoding Profiles](/profiles.md): Available quality presets explained
- [Configuration](/configuration.md): All configuration options
- [Custom Profiles](/advanced/custom-profiles.md): Create your own encoding profiles
- [Batch Processing](/advanced/batch-processing.md): Process multiple files
- [Troubleshooting](/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions
- [FAQ](/faq.md): Frequently asked questions

## Key Features

### Encoding Options
- **GPU Encoding (NVENC)**: Fast hardware encoding using NVIDIA T4 GPUs
- **CPU Encoding (x265)**: High-quality software encoding with psycho-visual optimizations
- **10-bit Color Depth**: Prevents color banding in anime gradients
- **Opus Audio**: Modern, efficient audio codec

### Quality Profiles
| Profile | Resolution | CRF/QP | Audio Bitrate | Use Case |
|---------|-----------|--------|---------------|----------|
| High Quality 1080p | 1920x1080 | 22 | 160kbps | Maximum quality |
| Balanced 1080p | 1920x1080 | 24 | 128kbps | Quality/size balance |
| Small 720p | 1280x720 | 26 | 112kbps | Space saving |
| Mobile 480p | 854x480 | 28 | 96kbps | Mobile devices |
| Mobile 360p | 640x360 | 30 | 96kbps | Low bandwidth |

### Workflow Steps
1. **Download**: aria2 downloads torrents/magnets/direct links
2. **Encode**: FFmpeg encodes with selected profile
3. **Upload**: Finished files auto-upload to Google Drive
4. **Shutdown**: Optional auto-shutdown to save compute

## Technical Details

- **Platform**: Google Colab (Free/Pro)
- **Video Codec**: HEVC/H.265 via NVENC or libx265
- **Audio Codec**: Opus (libopus)
- **Container**: MKV (Matroska)
- **GPU**: NVIDIA T4 (Colab free tier)
